author: Acorny
description: Sync your Acorny highlights into your vault as Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Acorny
manifest.description: Sync your Acorny highlights into your vault as Markdown notes.
manifest.name: Acorny Sync

name: Acorny Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Acorny Sync.

Sync your Acorny highlights into your Obsidian vault as Markdown notes — one note per source, idempotent append (your edits are preserved), with manual / on-startup / interval triggers.
